data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether customers can review and select a winner based on bids. However, the evidence provided does not include any explicit API reads or state checks confirming that a customer has reviewed bids or selected a winner. The linked use case describes the scenario but lacks concrete evidence of the actual behavior, leading to a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of customer reviewing bids and selecting a winner.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
